title: Traditional Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A richly spiced tagine, a classic Algerian dish made with tender lamb and fragrant spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides.
Add the spices, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
